items.summary: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

items.title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
items.summary: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.

items.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
items.summary: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

items.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
items.summary: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

items.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
items.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet…

items.title: Data for Agents
Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
items.summary: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

items.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
items.summary: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

items.title: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
items.summary: OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation. During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan Kumar called GPT-Live-1 the company's […]

items.title: Google updates Android Bench with new LLMs, but Gemini still lags behind
items.summary: Android Bench is evolving, and developers can help guide that process.

items.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
items.summary: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

items.title: These AI startups are growing revenue at faster and faster rates
items.summary: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.

items.title: Gaming laptops are too expensive right now, but this one’s a good value
items.summary: It’s not a great time to shop for a gaming laptop. The unprecedented rise in cost for RAM (and storage to a slightly lesser extent) has made laptops with low-to-midrange specs cost much more than they should. Recent deals on gaming laptops worth your attention have been uninspiring, but one recently caught my eye: MSI’s […]

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.

items.title: Fi’s Starlink-enabled pet tracker found my dog when LTE couldn’t
items.summary: Fi Ultra is the first Starlink-enabled pet tracker you can buy. It expands on GPS and LTE trackers, adding automatic failover to T-Mobile's T-Satellite-branded direct-to-cell service when venturing into cellular dead zones. That lets owners tap into SpaceX's constellation of low Earth orbit Starlink satellites to track their pets anywhere in the US. But it […]

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
